topics.title: OJ Simpson Legal Case and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal complexities of the OJ Simpson robbery case, the role of memorabilia dealers in the investigation, and a television segment featuring Sherry Shepherd's response to questions about the shape of the Earth.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Security Training
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Jenny McCarthy, the legal issues surrounding Isaiah Thomas, and a security guard's training and terminology.

topics.title: Bodyguard Training and Caller Interactions
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional requirements of being a bodyguard while discussing various listener interactions and celebrity mentions.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Broadcasting Talent
topics.summary: The studio discusses the value of professional broadcasters in satellite radio, the potential merger of XM and Sirius, and a game involving the pronunciation of various words.

topics.title: Word Game and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio features a competitive word-pronunciation game involving bets on various terms followed by an interview with author Sharon K. Jackson and a discussion with D.L. Hughley.

topics.title: Celebrity Trials and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores high-profile legal cases, the impact of social media on public discourse, and personal anecdotes regarding marriage and celebrity life.

topics.title: DL Hughley on Career and Personal History
topics.summary: The show features DL Hughley discussing his career choices, his past involvement with a gang, the complexities of his family history, and his experiences in stand-up comedy.

topics.title: Paul Anka and Henry Hill Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Paul Anka where he discusses his musical career, memories of performing at the Copa, and anecdotes involving Frank Sinatra and Milton Berle.

topics.title: Frank Sinatra and Las Vegas Casino Stories
topics.summary: The studio recounts anecdotes involving Frank Sinatra's behavior at the Sands, his interactions with Sammy Davis Jr., and a prank played on a hotel manager.

topics.title: Paul Anka's Career and Musical History
topics.summary: The show features Paul Anka discussing his personal life, his experience writing "My Way" for Frank Sinatra, his interactions with Elvis Presley, and observations on the drug culture of the 1950s and 60s.

topics.title: Gambling Anecdotes and Medical Procedures
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on past gambling experiences in casinos, the evolution of the music industry, and personal anecdotes regarding skin conditions and medical treatments.

topics.title: Medical Mishaps and News Stories
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of news items, including an incident where a man was nearly autopsied while alive in Venezuela, reports of a child running a sex club in Australia, and upcoming guest segments featuring Paul Anka and D.L. Hughley.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Legal Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including actor Arty Green's film residuals, Mel B's legal issues, a gym altercation involving Stuart Sugarman, the Phil Spector trial, and safety concerns regarding lead in Mattel toys.

topics.title: Historical Burial Customs and Current News
topics.summary: The show explores the history of graveyard shifts and burial bells before transitioning into a discussion on celebrity news, legal updates regarding O.J. Simpson, federal interest rates, and a controversial taser incident involving a student at a political event.
